name: 𝕄𝕚𝕟𝕕 𝕐𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕄𝕒𝕟𝕟𝕖𝕣𝕤
description:
𝖂𝖔𝖊 𝖇𝖊𝖙𝖎𝖉𝖊 𝖙𝖍𝖊𝖊 𝖈𝖆𝖑𝖑𝖔𝖚𝖘 𝖋𝖔𝖔𝖑, 𝖒𝖎𝖘𝖋𝖔𝖗𝖙𝖚𝖓𝖊 𝖇𝖔𝖚𝖓𝖉 𝖙𝖔 𝖙𝖍𝖞 𝖕𝖗𝖔𝖚𝖉 𝖙𝖔𝖔𝖑, 𝖜𝖎𝖙𝖍 𝖘𝖕𝖎𝖗𝖎𝖙𝖘 𝖆𝖇𝖔𝖛𝖊 𝖆𝖓𝖉 𝖌𝖔𝖉𝖘 𝖔𝖋 𝖔𝖑𝖉, 𝖙𝖍𝖞 𝖙𝖔𝖓𝖌𝖚𝖊 𝖘𝖍𝖆𝖑𝖑 𝖋𝖔𝖗𝖈𝖊 𝖙𝖍𝖞 𝖘𝖍𝖆𝖕𝖊 𝖙𝖔 𝖒𝖔𝖑𝖉, 𝖙𝖍𝖞 𝖈𝖆𝖗𝖊𝖑𝖊𝖘𝖘 𝖜𝖔𝖗𝖉𝖘 𝕴 𝖍𝖊𝖗𝖊𝖇𝖞 𝖒𝖆𝖗𝖐, 𝖆 𝖈𝖚𝖗𝖘𝖊 𝖔𝖋 𝖈𝖚𝖗𝖘𝖊𝖘 𝖎𝖓 𝖙𝖍𝖊 𝖉𝖆𝖗𝖐.

Curse words take on a new meaning with a bit of magic. You have a notoriously foul mouth sometimes, which can get you into trouble. Last night your careless words targeted the wrong person, a secret witch with a hex that might just cure you of being a prick in the truest sense. As the day progresses nothing seems out of the ordinary, but your body marches to a new beat, your words dictating their pace. The hex warped during casting, one meant to correct your foul mouth has extended to not just your tongue, but your thoughts as well. The hex tends to stay still so long as you: Mind Your Manners.

Design: I find many bots in this genre are done transforming in the first several messages or even the intro, meaning you have to hold the bot's hand or specify changes to go slow. I wanted to try to make a slow burn-bot that was entirely dictated by personal preference for transformation pacing that also allowed for a faster experience based on things that their persona might say/think naturally. This is functionally the same as the last Watch Your Mouth, with better detection.

Leave any feedback, stories, recommendations for token fluency, or bot ideas in the comments. I always read and appreciate them even if I don't reply or react to each one.

Credits: Inspiration for the status section taken from Mysteras's various works. All images are from Arisane's various works(@ArisaneArt on twitter), some lightly cropped or censored to abide with Janitor's rules. Arisane's works in pic order: Popularity, Train stop, Rejection Curse, Alien Abduction, TS Ideal Body

Tags: MtF, Transformation, Genderbender, Feminization/Forced-Feminization, tg/tgtf/tftg, Profanity, Body Alteration, Non-con, Bullying, and Dead Dove(since this is technically a noncon tf). [[All characters are 18+]]

Author Notes:

  • Why does this bot have a weird chat+message/fav ratio? I'm really bad at making bots and really indecisive. Making a bot like this as my first was a huge mistake. For transparency: take the chats/messages and subtract ~180/1.3k. I used test bots after release, all future numbers are other users.

  • Did 'Watch Your Mouth' work better for you? I have another bot named Bonesy, search '9/22 watch' in the example dialogue to get a copy of the previous version if that is what you preferred.

  • I have no intention on making a lore-book version atm. TLDR the problem with lore-books is they
creator: George13
